message: Updated ExecutionModeExample to configure PluginServer.Create with executionMode instead of mutating PluginManifest.Mode, and added PluginExecutionObservationTests coverage asserting server execution mode drives RequestedMode. Validation: dotnet test tests/SafeIR.Tests/SafeIR.Tests.csproj --filter FullyQualifiedName~PluginExecutionObservationTests; dotnet build examples/Addendum/SafeIR.AddendumExamples/SafeIR.AddendumExamples.csproj; ./scripts/check-csharp-file-lines.ps1.
